description_long: This house features a striking blend of historical and modern architectural elements, with a prominent turret on one corner capped by a conical spire. The facade is adorned with ornate gables, decorative window trims, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows on the upper stories. The ground floor is dominated by large, glass-panel windows, suggesting a possible commercial or communal space, while the upper floors are more traditional in design. The roof is steeply pitched with a gable form, and the rear and side walls are plain, lacking windows or ornamentation. The building is primarily finished in white, with a gray shingled roof and blue-tinted glass on the lower level. The overall structure is tall and narrow, typical of urban row houses or townhouses.
description: A tall, white house with ornate gables, a turreted corner, and large blue-tinted glass windows on the ground floor, topped by a steep gray gable roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, ornate gables, turret with spire, and expansive blue-tinted glass windows on the ground floor.
description_view_1: Angled front-left view highlighting the turret, decorative window trims, and the full extent of the glass-panel ground floor.
description_view_2: Rear-left view showing the plain, windowless side and rear walls, and the steep gable roof.
description_view_3: Rear view dominated by a blank wall and the sloped roof, with only the turret's spire visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with decorative trim, flanked by large glass panels, and a modest overhang.
